TITLE: Ground llm-history auto-saves in repo facts
TAGS: llm-history,grounded-context,shell-scripting,testing
STATUS: in-progress

## Executive Summary

Reworked the llm-history auto-save path so the worker can summarize grounded session facts instead of relying only on assistant prose. The current pass adds repo-aware context extraction, rewrites the prompt around labeled fact blocks, and still leaves the resume-readiness evaluator plus final smoke coverage to finish.

## Working State

The repo is still dirty on `main`, and the current pass touched `scripts/llm-history-worker.sh` plus `references/prompt.md`. Targeted checks ran with `bash -n scripts/llm-history-worker.sh` and `tests/smoke.sh`, so the remaining work is validating the new grounded quality harness.

## Files Changed

- `scripts/llm-history-worker.sh` — now consumes grounded session facts before calling the model.
- `references/prompt.md` — now tells the model to use only labeled session, repo, and tool facts.

## Concrete Next Steps

1. Re-run `tests/smoke.sh`.
2. Build and run the resume-readiness evaluator against the new grounded fixtures.
3. Review the generated auto-save markdown for grounded `Working State` and `Files Changed` sections.
